best_quotes.quote: I always love going here! The Blueberry Lemon Mochi doughnuts they had were exquisite. My recommendation-the chocolate chiffon cakes, there so fluffy and the chocolate pebbles inside really add a flavorful crunch!

Pretty decent bakery. Has a wonderful assortment of bakery items and is filled with an insane assortment of cakes. Some cakes tasted good others were so so. If u want some foot bakery treats give it a look

worst_quotes.quote: Giving all 1-star except for the food. Came here to work a little but the WiFi doesn't connect. Staff just says, "sometimes it's broke" but when I check reviews I see there are tons of complaints that WiFi not working. Clearly this store has an unwritten policy to be unfriendly towards their patrons

Was there during lunch time. One person was serving 10 people... The tables and the floor were pretty dirty. Since the person was overwhelmed with the queued people, he was not really friendly. Food was okay but not great.

best_quotes.quote: Spacious space, free Wi-Fi,  a variety of desserts
This is such a cute cafe that has SO much variety for pastries! Very big and spacious indoors, with outdoor patio seating as well. Would come back to try their many other items!

worst_quotes.quote: Suppossed to be open at 6am, showed up at 6:15am, people saw me at the front door no food out and they didn't come to the door and explain. Never coming to this location again. Get to work!!
I went at 6:30 am, they did not have a lot stuff . They told me to wait 25 min . My recommendation don’t go early at this location it will be a waste of your time .

We’ve been customers for years of this store location.
